chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The commission may authorize a regional mobility authority to issue permits for the movement of oversize or overweight vehicles carrying cargo in Hidalgo County on:

subsections.label: A
subsections.text: U.S. Highway 281 between its intersection with the Pharr-Reynosa International Bridge and its intersection with State Highway 336;

subsections.label: B
subsections.text: State Highway 336 between its intersection with U.S. Highway 281 and its intersection with Farm-to-Market Road 1016;

subsections.label: C
subsections.text: Farm-to-Market Road 1016 between its intersection with State Highway 336 and its intersection with Trinity Road;

subsections.label: D
subsections.text: Trinity Road between its intersection with Farm-to-Market Road 1016 and its intersection with Farm-to-Market Road 396;

subsections.label: E
subsections.text: Farm-to-Market Road 396 between its intersection with Trinity Road and its intersection with the Anzalduas International Bridge;

subsections.label: F
subsections.text: Farm-to-Market Road 2061 between its intersection with Farm-to-Market Road 3072 and its intersection with U.S. Highway 281;

subsections.label: G
subsections.text: U.S. Highway 281 between its intersection with the Pharr-Reynosa International Bridge and its intersection with Spur 29;

subsections.label: H
subsections.text: Spur 29 between its intersection with U.S. Highway 281 and its intersection with Doffin Canal Road;

subsections.label: I
subsections.text: Doffin Canal Road between its intersection with the Pharr-Reynosa International Bridge and its intersection with Spur 29;

subsections.label: J
subsections.text: Farm-to-Market Road 1015 between its intersection with U.S. Highway 281 and its intersection with U.S. Highway 83 Business;

subsections.label: K
subsections.text: U.S. Highway 83 Business between its intersection with Farm-to-Market Road 1015 and its intersection with South Pleasantview Drive;

subsections.label: L
subsections.text: Farm-to-Market Road 1015 between its intersection with U.S. Highway 83 Business and its intersection with Mile 9 Road North; and

subsections.label: M
subsections.text: Mile 9 Road North between its intersection with Farm-to-Market Road 1015 and its intersection with Joe Stephens Avenue; or
another route designated by the commission in consultation with the authority.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The authority authorized under this section must serve the same geographic location as the roads over which the permit is valid.
Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 623.322 (Qualification; Requirements) by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1236 (S.B. 1296 ), Sec. 21.001(61), eff. September 1, 2015.

history.raw: Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1053 (H.B.1969), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2015.
